name: ETERNA Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: Travel, dining, online, and international spends

domestic: Unlimited complimentary domestic lounge access requires ₹40,000 net spends in the preceding calendar quarter.
For newly issued fresh cards, the spend threshold is waived in the quarter of card issuance; if the card is issued in the last month of a quarter, the waiver extends through the following quarter.
Interest, fees, reversed transactions, and EMI instalments are excluded from the lounge-eligibility spend calculation.

exclusions: Fees and charges (joining fee, annual fee, finance charges, and other levied charges)
milestoneBenefits: 10,000 bonus reward points on spending ₹50,000 within first 60 days
20,000 bonus reward points on annual spends of ₹5,00,000
additionalBenefits: Free personal accident death cover: air ₹1 crore, non-air ₹10 lakh
Up to 3 lifetime free add-on cards

salaried: Annual income of ₹12 lakh or more
selfEmployed: Annual income of ₹12 lakh or more

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
Audited against the official Bank of Baroda Eterna product page on 2026-06-14.

The current product page explicitly confirms milestone rewards, cashback redemption at 1 reward point = ₹0.25, fuel surcharge waiver, insurance cover, and the ₹12 lakh annual income eligibility threshold.

The current official rewards copy says 15 reward points per ₹100 on online shopping, international, dining, and travel spends with a maximum of 5,000 reward points per statement, so the accelerated row is modeled as one combined capped bucket rather than separate per-category caps.
BOBCARD's lounge terms PDF dated 1 April 2026 confirms that domestic lounge access requires ₹40,000 net spends in the preceding calendar quarter, with a fresh-card waiver in the issuance quarter.
